questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Which of the given statements are correct?
options: Entropy of micellization is negative as a large number of molecules associate to form larger molecules
Entropy of micellization is positive due to the increased freedom of hydrophobic chain in the nonpolar interior of the micelle as compared to aqueous environment
Enthalpy of micellization is often positive
The micellization process is governed primarily by the entropy gain associated with it
questions.solution: $\Delta \mathrm{S}$ is positive for micellisation. $\Delta \mathrm{H}$ is generally positive and this is compensated by the large negative values of ( $-\mathrm{T} \Delta \mathrm{S}$ )
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.q: Which of the following statements are correct:
options: The flocculating value of $\mathrm{PO}_4^{3-}$ is less than that of $\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-}$.
Charcoal adsorbs gases with higher critical temperature more than gases with lower critical temperature.
In the manufacture of $\mathrm{NH}_3$ by Haber's process, molybdenum is used as promoter for the catalyst iron.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
